welcome_desc_2: I am dedicated to turning your ideas into real actions and solving problems efficiently. I can build apps and transform systems according to your desires, crafting your exclusive digital world.
welcome_desc_3: The future will not remain formless — the future takes physical shape.
welcome_admin_hint: Please set up your administrator account for system security.
welcome_model_hint: Configure your AI core engine, supporting multiple providers.
welcome_intro_hint: System is ready. Here is the first response from the AI core:
welcome_default_intro: Hi, I am AIOS. Nice to meet you.
